hero.title: Websites that work for you.
hero.subtitle: Many websites just sit there. Yours can book appointments, keep content up to date, and bring in enquiries, even after hours.

reb.progressLabel: Progress – click or drag to jump
reb.reducedMotionIntro: Instead of showing properties only on expensive portals, REB now presents them on its own website, live from the broker software.

chapters.label: Before
chapters.title: A website without properties
chapters.body: An ageing WordPress theme: lots of text, a few photos, but not a single property in sight.

chapters.label: After
chapters.title: Every property on their own site
chapters.body: The website now displays listings live from the broker software, always current and without manual work.

chapters.label: Result
chapters.title: Independent and always current
chapters.body: Enquiries arrive directly through the company website, without a portal detour, and read well on every device.

booking.title: Online booking for service businesses
booking.meta: Online appointments · Admin panel · Concept demo
booking.body: Fewer missed calls, less back-and-forth in chat. The website collects appointment wishes, contact details, and context so the next step is clear.
booking.requestBody: Preferred time, contact details, and message are already together.
booking.question: Question

steps.label: Book
steps.title: Interest becomes an appointment
steps.body: Visitors see available times and choose the right slot before the impulse fades.

steps.label: Request
steps.title: The key details arrive together
steps.body: Name, contact, service, and desired time land in one place. No guessing, no back-and-forth.

steps.label: Manage
steps.title: The business keeps the overview
steps.body: New requests arrive sorted in the admin area and can be confirmed or answered directly.

heading.title: Features that actually help day to day.
heading.sub: Four examples of what your website can do beyond being a digital business card.

software.note: I’ll tell you honestly what is worth it.

outcomes.title: Book appointments online
outcomes.body: Customers book free times themselves around the clock, without a phone call.

outcomes.title: Always current content
outcomes.body: Offers, prices, or availability update automatically. You only maintain them in one place.

outcomes.title: Show Google reviews
outcomes.body: Your best Google reviews appear automatically and build trust before someone calls.

outcomes.title: Answer questions automatically
outcomes.body: An AI assistant answers common questions around the clock and forwards real enquiries to you.

gfx.aiAnswer: The first one is free. Should I suggest a time?

heading.title: From idea to finished website.
heading.sub: You get a clear website at a fixed price. We only plan extra functions when they genuinely make sense for your business.

steps.title: One conversation
steps.body: You tell me your goal, by phone or at your place.

steps.title: A clickable draft
steps.body: You see and click through your site before anything is final.

steps.title: Your live website
steps.body: Finished online, mobile-optimised, and ready for new enquiries.

angebot.priceNote: One-time fixed price, finalised after our call.
angebot.recurringRest: – then €50/month for hosting, domain, updates, and small changes.

ueber.title: Hi, I’m Néstor.
body: I develop software professionally and build websites with the same standards: fast, stable, and understandable.
You don’t need to deal with the tech. I translate your idea into a website that looks good, works, and brings you enquiries.

kontakt.title: Let’s talk.
kontakt.intro: You don’t need a finished concept. A rough idea is enough. In the free first call, I’ll tell you honestly what makes sense.
kontakt.sentBody: Thank you. Your message reached me. I’ll get back to you personally in one or two days.
kontakt.name: Name
kontakt.errorBeforeEmail: That did not work just now. Please try again or write to me directly at
kontakt.privacy: Your message comes directly to me, personally, not to an automated system.

impressum.title: Legal notice
paragraphs:
Information according to § 5 TMG
Néstor Iriondo
Web development & digital consulting
Please add the full address for service and all final mandatory details before publication.

datenschutz.title: Privacy
paragraphs: This website processes personal data when you contact me via the contact form, email, phone, or WhatsApp.
The information is used only to answer your enquiry and prepare a possible collaboration. It is only shared when technically required or legally necessary.
The final privacy policy should be checked against the services actually used, such as hosting, form delivery, analytics, or embedded content.
